programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: In this episode, competitor James gives us an update on how his injuries are progressing and how he’s able to push through when most thought he would be long gone. Luckily for the competitors, he had a special demonstration ready that involved hollow points and gel blocks. Later, Matthew recaps his experience with “The Glove”. To cap things off, Chris also sits down with BodyHz to talk about innovations in the non-chemical health industry.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The mission is still imminent, but something pressing came up.. some really cool guns! This course of fire includes an amazing rifle, a man down and an opportunity to go full-auto. Then, Crossfire lets the team try out a tactical bat that includes a 22LR Pistol and a window breaker spike. If that’s not enough to get the blood pumping, the contestants try out a silencer fit for the most secretive of missions and a John Wick shotgun. Buckle up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Hell has frozen over because Don Mann has canceled PT, to the contestants feigned disappointment. Instead, the entire cast is at W.O.F.T. for some intense CQB training. Chris and Cindy get sit down with Jen and Lanny and W.O.F.T. gets an Olympic-level endorsement as one of the best tactical training facilities in the world.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Viewers get an inside scoop on the creation of Modern Pneumatic Air Rifles and their origin story. Spoiler Alert, it involves a big game hunt in South Africa. Next, Athlon Optics goes over how they’ve revolutionized Hog Hunting and thermal optics as a whole. Later, we get a look at the leader board and how close the race is going into the finale.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S3E4 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go further behind the scenes as the crew captures Tokyo’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture reigns supreme. They search for the elusive Shinichi Moroboshi, a legendary figure in Japan’s supercar scene and well-known Lamborghini enthusiast. The adventure continues in the snow with GoPro athletes John Jackson and Chris Benchetler on a quest for the perfect ride. From the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Hakuba and the untouched powder fields of Hokkaido, the crew follows every moment of their journey. Along the way, you will see how these breathtaking stories were crafted, from scouting locations to capturing the raw energy and beauty of each scene. This is your all-access pass to the artistry, adrenaline, and dedication that make these adventures unforgettable.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: S1E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: S2E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: From polar bears to roaring lions—this is GoPro Adventures at its wildest. Dive into jaw-dropping encounters with lions, whales, turtles, giraffes, and watch “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson at his South African sanctuary, where rescued predators find a second chance. It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Good Deed DIY: Expecting Mom Floored By New Nursery
programme.desc: Expecting mom Lacey does so much for her community but barely has time to take care of herself. Can Monica and friends create a serene, picture-perfect nursery in just 24 hours?

programme.title: Good Deed DIY: Beloved Educator Gets Staff Lounge Facelift
programme.desc: Teachers deserve the best! Monica races against the clock to transform a beloved educator’s staff lounge. Can she pull off this scholastic surprise?

programme.title: Unbelievable: Rescues From the Brink
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.
